---
name: Lesson bug / unclear instruction
about: Something in a lesson is wrong, broken, or confusing
title: "[lesson] "
labels: ["lesson", "bug"]
---

**Which episode / page?**
<!-- e.g. lessons/episodes/03-ros2-navigation.qmd, "Making a robot move" section -->

**What's wrong or confusing?**
<!-- Be specific. Quote the text or command if you can. -->

**What did you expect?**

**What actually happened?**
<!-- Error messages, screenshots, or the output you got. -->

**Environment (if relevant)**
- OS:
- Local install or cloud fallback?
- Tool versions (e.g. `git --version`, `quarto --version`, ROS distro):

**Were you a learner, helper, or instructor when you hit this?**
